meaning: n.横杆,围栏,扶手,铁轨vt.以横木围栏,铺铁轨vi.责骂,抱怨
examples: Raw materials and labour come by ship , rail or road.
Ticket prices include your flight and onward rail journey.
She climbed the staircase cautiously, holding fast to the rail.
Meanwhile, rail fares in West Yorkshire are rising by 6.2% - more than the national average.
This includes road and rail links and quality business hotels in more remote locations.
